channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Wisconsin Democrat touts union endorsement opposing CDL crackdowns on undocumented truckers
item.description: Rebecca Cooke promotes AFSCME support; the union published a toolkit to bypass CDL restrictions for undocumented immigrants.

item.title: Blue state governor criticized as 'arsonist' amid Newark unrest
item.description: Gov. Mikie Sherrill blames out-of-state agitators for Delaney Hall unrest, but critics note insufficient police presence before clashes.

item.title: Steve Hilton to Newsmax: I Can Turn California Red
item.description: Steve Hilton, running for California governor, told Newsmax that finishing top two in the primary could allow him to turn the state red.

item.title: New Pro-Spencer Pratt Ad Eviscerates Leftist Thinking in Hilarious Fashion
